title: Update to Go 1.24
body:
… and benefit from the new features.

Also a set somewhat-related cleanups; see individual commit messages for details.

Warning: absolutely untested in practice.

comments.body: With the current github action we use it should be trivial to add a macos and windows lint job as well, given there is a fair amount of platform specific code that might make sense to do.
Non blocking but podman CI is not yet ready for 1.24 https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27017#issuecomment-3267081316 but that should be solved soon so we can definitely merge this here.
@Luap99 Thanks, updated (along with a few more reverts of overzealous `strings.Cut`, and some small cleanups on top).
